seoTitle: How to Become ClickUp Verified: Power User & Consultant
metaDescription: Learn the steps to earn ClickUp's Verified badge, from completing ClickUp University courses to submitting your application for review.
intro: Earning ClickUp Verified status is a way to show real expertise, whether you're an independent consultant or a power user inside your own company. This guide walks through the general path toward verification, including completing proficiency courses through ClickUp University, documenting your real-world workspace usage, and submitting your application through the official partner portal.

steps.heading: Choose your verification track
steps.body: Review the distinct tracks available, such as Power Users, Social Ambassadors, and Certified Consultants, to decide which fits your background.

steps.heading: Complete proficiency courses
steps.body: Work through ClickUp University to complete baseline certifications relevant to your chosen track, such as Admin Essentials or AI Expert.

steps.heading: Document your platform usage
steps.body: Gather concrete evidence of your workspace builds, custom fields, and automation setups to demonstrate real-world expertise.

steps.heading: Submit the official application
steps.body: Navigate to the ClickUp Partner Portal and complete the Verified application intake form with your credentials and use-case evidence.

steps.heading: Track your application status
steps.body: Monitor your registered email for updates during the evaluation period, since review timelines can vary.

steps.heading: Display your badge
steps.body: Once approved, check your profile settings to confirm your verified checkmark appears and explore the community perks available to verified members.

faq.question: How long does the ClickUp verification process take?
faq.answer: Evaluation timelines vary, so it's worth monitoring your registered email regularly for updates on your application status.

faq.question: Do I need a paid ClickUp account to apply for verification?
faq.answer: The description doesn't specify a strict requirement, but demonstrating real, substantial platform usage is part of the evidence you'll need to submit.

faq.question: What's the difference between a Power User and a Certified Consultant?
faq.answer: Power Users are typically recognized for deep internal platform usage, while Certified Consultants are verified to offer ClickUp workflow consulting services externally.

faq.question: What do I get once I'm verified?
faq.answer: Verified members can access an exclusive community portal, claim swag, and get early access to beta feature toolkits.
